prompt: Showdown check: The board already makes the best straight for both players. Who wins?
why_v1: When the board already holds the best five-card hand, both players tie and board plays.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Board plays and both players tie.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. This board makes the best hand for everyone.
recap_v1: Use the visible hole cards and full board first. Sometimes hero wins, sometimes villain wins, and sometimes the board already plays for everyone.
